title: Random Enchantments
description: This crappy mod, as it's name indicates, adds random enchantments that i thought of or are AI generated. Also made with MCreator
body:
# Random Enchantments
## WARNING: This is my first published mod, and as such, might be buggy or broken. Use with caution!
Random Enchantments is a Forge mod that only adds stupid (Or rarely useful) enchantments that might be unbalanced or broken. The mod in the future might also have dependencies.
## Now, here are some enchantments that the mod adds
### Mining Madness
Mining Madness is a curse that has a random chance to cause an event from a predetermined list of events to happen at the place of the last block you broke. One of the events spawns 5 cakes at the location of the last block you broke.
### Place Swap
Place Swap is an enchantment that makes it when you damage a mob, you swap places with it. Very simple.
### Chicken Fury
Chicken Fury is an enchantment that has a chance to turn the mob you damaged into a chicken. Except if it's a player or an Ender Dragon.

This mod is only for 1.19.2. And most importantly, was made with MCreator
